item.title: Single Number II on Leetcode
item.author: Author
item.description: State machine is common and useful technique to be used in algorithm. I really recommend you to figure the last solution out thoroughly. Then try my extended problem! Writeup The programming language in video is C++ For the source code in video: Github Conclusion Solution 1 and 2 are similiar to each other, and they both try using 3*n + 1 to separate the single number from the others.
